title: symphony-board contract envelope
description: LAYER 3: the versioned projection of the canonical store, serialized for consumers (UI, external tools). Derived from the DB; never the DB schema itself. Versioning rules: additive-by-default within a major (new fields optional/nullable, never repurpose/remove); breaking changes bump `contract_version` major. Producers validate strictly against this schema; CONSUMERS MUST ignore unknown fields (be liberal in what you accept) so a minor addition never breaks an old reader.

contract_version.description: Semver. Major = breaking; minor = additive; patch = clarification. The UI branches on major.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC instant this contract was emitted.

generator.description: Tool + version that produced this payload, e.g. "symphony-board/0.1.0".

sources.description: The record sources represented in this contract, with their last sync health so a consumer can flag stale/partial data.

items.description: Windowed work-item rows. In contract v2 this is complete for `item_window`, plus edge endpoints needed by emitted edges. Use `aggregates` and `repo_stats` for full totals.

edges.description: Issue <-> PR/MR relationships (the workflow spine) and any other typed links.

activities.description: Developer-significant activity records, sorted newest first. Optional (added in 1.2.0); old v1 consumers ignore it.

repos.description: Per-repo display metadata (currently: highlight color). Sparse — a repo appears only when it has a configured color. Optional (added in 1.1.0); an old consumer ignores it.

aggregates.description: Server-provided totals aligned to named view scopes. Optional (added in 1.3.0); consumers use a row only when its scope/window/filter exactly matches the visible view, otherwise they compute locally.

repo_stats.description: Full canonical repo counts for Settings and external consumers. Separate from `items[]` because v2 does not ship every item row.

ref.description: Composite item reference "<source_id>|<external_id>". source_id never contains '|'; split on the FIRST '|' only (external_id may contain ':' and '/', e.g. a GitLab gid).

color.description: Optional source-level highlight color (hex). null when unset. (added in 1.1.0)

project_path.description: Matches the items' project_path for this repo.

item.description: Canonical core (always present) + nullable extension layer.

window_reasons.description: Why this row is present in a v2 windowed item payload. Missing means primary for old v1 payloads.

scope.description: Parsed prefix of a "scope::value" label, or null.

type.description: closes | relates | mentions | blocks | blocked_by | parent | child (open vocabulary). `closes` is the workflow-bearing one.

from.description: The asserting endpoint. For `closes`, the change request.

to.description: The target endpoint. For `closes`, the issue.

lifecycle.description: declared = unresolved; fulfilled = change request merged AND target closed; broken = change request closed unmerged.

external_id.description: Provider event id, or a producer-stable derived event id.

kind.description: issue | change_request | commit | push | branch | tag | review | comment | ... (open vocabulary).

action.description: opened | closed | merged | pushed | created | deleted | commented | ... (open vocabulary).

target_ref.description: Composite item ref when the activity targets a tracked provider object.

countMap.description: Open string-keyed count map. Keys are contract vocabulary values such as item states, item kinds, or edge lifecycles; values are non-negative counts.

items.description: Primary total for this scope: items for global/board, rendered graph nodes for graph/focus.

kind.description: full = whole emitted contract for this scope; active_since = rows at/after `since`; focus = a viewer-local focus neighbourhood.

basis.description: The rule used to include rows in the aggregate window.

since.description: Inclusive UTC cutoff for active_since windows, null for full/focus rows without a cutoff.

days.description: Relative preset length used to derive `since` from generated_at, or null for full/custom focus rows.

edge_filter.description: Edge vocabulary filter represented by this aggregate. null means no edge filter applies.

scope.description: Named view scope for the totals. Mirrors the UI vocabulary.
The primary item window represented by `items[]`.

primary_items.description: Loaded items that are complete for the primary window.

edge_endpoint_items.description: Loaded items outside the primary window, included only to resolve emitted edge endpoints.

total_items.description: Full live item count in the canonical projection before v2 windowing.

truncated.description: True when `items[]` omits at least one full live item row.
